zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Lisle於1130年出生在英國素福爾可易沃斯時，她的父親Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking"6歲，母親Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess4歲。她與Gilbert le Blount結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1198年之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Lisle于1130年出生在英国素福爾可易沃斯时，她的父亲Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking"6岁，母亲Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess4岁。她与Gilbert le Blount结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1198年之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Lisle was born in 1130, in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, her father, Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking", was 6 and her mother, Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess, was 4. She married Gilbert le Blount. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1198, in her hometown, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Lisle est née en 1130, à Ixworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking", avait 6 ans et sa mère, Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert le Blount. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1198, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Lisle 1130 in Ixworth, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking" 6 und ihre Mutter Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess 4. Sie hat Gilbert le Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1198 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Lisle è nata il nel 1130 nel Ixworth, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking", aveva 6 anni e sua madre, Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess, aveva 4 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert le Blount. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1198, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Lisleが1130年にイギリススフォルクイクスウオルスで生まれた時，父Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking"は6歳，母Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princessは4歳であった。Gilbert le Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1198年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Lisle(이)가 1130년 영국 수폴크 이스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking"(은)는 6세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 Gilbert le Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1198년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Lisle nasceu em 1130, em Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking", tinha 6 anos e sua mãe, Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess, tinha 4 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert le Blount. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1198, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Lisle родилась в 1130 г. в местности иксворт, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking" было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert le Blount. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1198 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Lisle nació en 1130, en Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Somerled of the Isles King Of Man"the Viking", tenía 6 años y su mamá, Ragnhild or Rachel or affrica of isle of Man Princess, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Gilbert le Blount. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1198, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
